      class EmptyDeckException extends Exception implements Serializable

        • availablePileCards
          int availablePileCards
          Number of cards available in the table pile when the exception was raised.

      class GameException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      class InvalidPlayerCountException extends GameException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • suppliedCount
          int suppliedCount
          The invalid machine-player count that was supplied.

    • Exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayException

      class InvalidPlayException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • card
          Card card
          The card that was illegally played.
        • currentSum
          int currentSum
          The table sum at the moment the illegal play was attempted.

    • Exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.NoPlayableCardException

      class NoPlayableCardException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentSum
          int currentSum
          The table sum that made all cards unplayable.
        • playerName
          String playerName
          Name of the player who has no valid move.
